Management of modal windows, kernel UI graphics, content indicators, timeline actions, and system icons.

## Folders
- **[modals](modals/README.md)**: Management of modal windows in a UI, including priorities, visibility, focus, and transitions.

## Files
- **[kernel_ui.c](kernel_ui.c.md)**: Manages kernel UI graphics context, content indicators, and timeline item action sources.
- **[kernel_ui.h](kernel_ui.h.md)**: Functions for initializing UI, managing graphics context, content indicators, and timeline actions.
- **[system_icons.h](system_icons.h.md)**: Defines bitmap data for various system and action bar icons used in the Pebble firmware.
